description_long: This is a large, freestanding wooden cabinet with a central sliding door that features a tall rectangular mirror panel. The cabinet is finished in a medium brown wood grain, giving it a warm and classic appearance. On one side, there are four open, curved shelves that provide additional storage or display space. The back of the cabinet is plain, with no visible features or openings. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a modern yet functional design. The mirrored door likely slides to reveal internal storage compartments or hanging space for clothing or other items.
description: A large, brown wooden cabinet with a central mirrored sliding door and four open side shelves. The design is modern and functional, suitable for storage and display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mirrored sliding door and the wood grain finish.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the four open, curved shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden back panel with no features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a solid wood panel with no shelves.
